sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value_a VARCHAR, value_b DATE, list_col_a LIST<INTEGER>, list_col_b LIST<INTEGER>);
SELECT list_zip(list_col_a, list_col_b, [10]) AS zipped_lists, (DATE '2023-10-01' + id) AS incremented_date FROM test_table WHERE value_a IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, list_zip(list_col_a, list_col_b, [12, 15], TRUE) AS truncated_zipped FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(value_a) > 0;
SELECT id, list_zip(list_col_a, list_col_b) AS zip_result FROM test_table WHERE (DATE '2023-10-01' + id) < DATE '2023-10-05';
CREATE TABLE another_table (key_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, some_list LIST<VARCHAR>, join_date DATE);
INSERT INTO another_table VALUES (1, ['foo', 'bar'], DATE '2023-10-01'), (2, NULL, DATE '2023-10-02');
SELECT a.id, list_zip(a.list_col_a, b.some_list) AS joined_zip FROM test_table a JOIN another_table b ON a.id = b.key_id WHERE b.join_date + 1 > a.value_b;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_zip FROM (SELECT list_zip(a.list_col_a, b.list_col_b) FROM test_table a CROSS JOIN test_table b) AS zipped_lists WHERE total_zip IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_table AS SELECT list_zip(list_col_a, list_col_b, [NULL]) AS mixed_zip FROM test_table WHERE value_a IS NOT NULL;
